title: Jump Game — Minimum Jumps
statement:
Given an array `nums` where `nums[i]` is the maximum jump length from index `i`, return the minimum number of jumps to reach the last index. You can always reach the last index.

**Input:** Space-separated non-negative integers.
**Output:** Print the minimum number of jumps.
constraints:
- 1 ≤ nums.length ≤ 10⁴
- 0 ≤ nums[i] ≤ 1000
- It is guaranteed you can reach the last index.

examples.explanation: Jump 1 to index 1, then 3 to last. 2 jumps.
Jump 1 to index 1, then 3 to last.
Must hop one step at a time.
